description: Gold clip windows (the word-precise span a viewer should watch for each QA item). clip.coverage = mean best-match IoU between each gold clip and the stitched clips for that video. UNGATED until >=3 stable items; see harness. M2.3.

items.q: What is the foundational architecture for modern language models according to talk_a?
What did the Chinchilla study show about training tokens and model size?
What was the optimal context length for retrieval in the experiments?
Which model family reused the Chinchilla token ratio?
Why might scaling laws stop being predictable beyond a certain scale?
